message.content:
Explore the profile page in this Next.js/FSD codebase. I need to understand:
1. What files make up the profile page (pages-layer, widgets, features, entities related to profile)
2. How the phone number field is currently displayed (read-only or editable?)
3. What API endpoints exist for updating profile data (check entities/profile or similar)
4. What the current form structure looks like for profile editing

Look in src/pages-layer/, src/widgets/, src/features/, src/entities/ for profile-related code. Also check src/shared/config/api-routes.ts for profile API routes. Be thorough.

"", 53 email: profile.email, 54 phone: profile.phone, 55 uaeId: "", 56 }, 57 }); 58 59 function onSubmit(data: EditProfileFormData) { 60 updateProfile( 61 { 62 firstName: data.firstName, 63 lastName: data.lastName, 64 patronymic: data.patronymic || undefined, 65 }, 66 { 67 onSuccess: () => { 68 toast.success("Profile updated successfully"); 69 onOpenChange(false); 70 }, 71 onError: () => { 72 toast.error("Failed to update profile"); 73 }, 74 }, 75 ); 76 } 77 78 return ( 79 80 81 {/* Header */} 82

content.text:
Perfect. Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile the findings: ## Profile Page Exploration - Complete Findings Based on my thorough exploration of the FSD (Feature-Sliced Design) codebase, here's the comprehensive breakdown: ### 1. **Files That Make Up The Profile Page** **Pages Layer:** - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/pages-layer/profile/ui/profile-page.tsx` - Main profile page component - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/pages-layer/profile/index.ts` - Exports **Widgets (Complex UI Components):** - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/edit-profile-modal/ui/edit-profile-modal.tsx` - Profile editing modal - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/edit-profile-modal/model/types.ts` - Form data types - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/edit-profile-modal/index.ts` - Exports - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/widgets/address-modal/` - Address management modal (also used) **Entities (Data/Business Logic):** - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/entities/profile/model/types.ts` - All profile data types - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/entities/profile/api/services.ts` - API service functions - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/entities/profile/api/query-hooks.ts` - React Query hooks - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/entities/profile/index.ts` - Exports **Shared UI Components:** - `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/shared/ui/profile-menu/profile-menu.tsx` - Profile menu (sidebar navigation) **No Features Layer:** There are no profile-specific features in the features layer. --- ### 2. **Phone Number Field Display - Currently READ-ONLY & DISABLED** The phone number field is **displayed as READ-ONLY** in two places: **On the Profile Page (profile-page.tsx, lines 486-492):** ```tsx Phone number {profile.phone || "Add your phone number"} ``` - Shows the phone number as plain text (not an input field) - Shows a muted "Add your phone number" message if no phone exists **In the Edit Profile Modal (edit-profile-modal.tsx, lines 193-215):** ```tsx
🇦🇪 +971
``` - Input field has `disabled` prop set to true - Has disabled background color (`bg-[#EDE9E3]`) - Shows UAE country code (+971) as context but field itself cannot be edited - Form validation treats it as optional: `phone: z.string().optional()` --- ### 3. **API Endpoints for Profile Updates** From `/Users/ilyakonyaev/work/coddtech/lux/luxflow-fe/src/shared/config/api-routes.ts` (lines 84-90): ```typescript PROFILE: { GET: "/profile", UPDATE: "/profile", UPDATE_PHOTO: "/profile/photo", ADDRESS: "/profile/address", SETTINGS: "/profile/settings", } ``` **Available API endpoints:** - **GET `/profile`** - Fetch profile data - **PATCH `/profile`** - Update profile (firstName, lastName, patronymic only) - **PATCH `/profile/photo`** - Update profile photo - **PATCH `/profile/address`** - Upsert/manage addresses - **DELETE `/profile/address/{id}`** - Delete specific address - **GET `/profile/settings`** - Get user settings (notifications, currency) - **PATCH `/profile/settings`** - Update user settings **Note:** There is NO dedicated phone update endpoint. The phone field cannot be updated via the current API design. --- ### 4. **Current Form Structure for Profile Editing** **Edit Profile Modal Form Structure:** The `EditProfileModal` uses React Hook Form with Zod validation: ```typescript // Schema validation editProfileSchema = z.object({ firstName: z.string().min(1, "First name is required"), lastName: z.string().min(1, "Last name is required"), patronymic: z.string().optional(), email: z.string().email("Invalid email").optional(), phone: z.string().optional(), uaeId: z.string().optional(), }) ``` **Editable Fields:** 1. First Name (required) 2. Last Name (required) 3. Middle Name/Patronymic (optional) **Read-Only/Disabled Fields:** 1. Email (disabled, background: `#EDE9E3`) 2. Phone Number (disabled, background: `#EDE9E3`, with +971 prefix) 3. UAE ID (disabled, background: `#EDE9E3`) **What Gets Submitted:** Only the editable fields are sent to the API: ```typescript function onSubmit(data: EditProfileFormData) { updateProfile( { firstName: data.firstName, lastName: data.lastName, patronymic: data.patronymic || undefined, }, // ... ); } ``` **Profile Type Definition** (from entities/profile/model/types.ts): ```typescript interface Profile { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string; patronymic: string | null; email: string; phone: string; photoFileId: string | null; roles: UserRole[]; selectedRole: UserRole; admin?: Admin; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; } interface UpdateProfileDto { firstName: string; lastName: string; patronymic?: string; } ``` --- ### 5. **Key Hooks Used for Profile Management** From the `entities/profile/api/query-hooks.ts`: - `useProfile()` - Fetch profile - `useUpdateProfile()` - Update profile (name/patronymic only) - `useUpdateProfilePhoto()` - Update profile picture - `useAddresses()` - Fetch addresses - `useUpsertAddress()` - Create/update address - `useDeleteAddress()` - Delete address - `useUserSettings()` - Fetch settings - `useUpdateUserSettings()` - Update settings (notifications, currency) --- ### Summary The profile page is a comprehensive user settings hub with multiple card sections (profile details, picture, addresses, notifications, currency). However, **the phone number field is intentionally disabled for editing** - it can only be displayed. All mutations are cached via React Query and trigger automatic cache invalidations.
